content:
🌟 filebrowser | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Self-hosted web-based file management and administration.
✨ Key Features: • Web-based file management • User and access control • File sharing with customizable options • OIDC, LDAP, JWT, password + 2FA, and proxy login support • Responsive and customizable UI
📖 Summary: FileBrowser Quantum is a self-hosted, web-based file manager that offers advanced features for managing files, users, and access permissions. It aims to be a user-friendly and powerful alternative to existing solutions, with a focus on a streamlined configuration and an efficient user interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
